description.2intro: I enjoy turning ideas into smooth and intuitive web experiences. Every line of code is a building block that creates a sustainable, high-performance, and accessible project for everyone.
description.end: : three words that guide my vision of development. I believe that a good product is not just about its design or technology, but the emotion and impact it generates.

contact_section.title: Let's Connect
contact_section.text: Although I am not currently looking for new opportunities, my inbox is always open. Whether you have a question or just want to say hi, I'll try my best to get back to you!

quotes.text: Code is like humor. When you have to explain it, it’s bad.
quotes.author: Cory House

quotes.text: Design is not just what it looks like and feels like. Design is how it works.
quotes.author: Steve Jobs

quotes.text: First, solve the problem. Then, write the code.
quotes.author: John Johnson

quotes.text: Make it work, make it right, make it fast.
quotes.author: Kent Beck

quotes.text: Perfection is achieved, not when there is nothing more to add, but when there is nothing left to take away.
quotes.author: Antoine de Saint-Exupéry

quotes.text: Computer science is no more about computers than astronomy is about telescopes.
quotes.author: Edsger Dijkstra

quotes.text: A good programmer is someone who always looks both ways before crossing a one-way street.
quotes.author: Doug Linder

quotes.text: The best way to predict the future is to invent it.
quotes.author: Alan Kay

quotes.text: Details make perfection, and perfection is not a detail.
quotes.author: Leonardo da Vinci

quotes.text: Everybody in this country should learn to program a computer, because it teaches you how to think.
quotes.author: Steve Jobs

quotes.text: Talk is cheap. Show me the code.
quotes.author: Linus Torvalds

quotes.text: Quality means doing it right when no one is looking.
quotes.author: Henry Ford

quotes.text: It's not a bug, it's an undocumented feature.
quotes.author: Anonymous
